name: Date-Nut Logs
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Southern Living
Preparation Time: 0:20
1. Combine the first five ingredients in a large saucepan.
2. Cook over low heat for 10 minutes, stirring constantly.
3. Remove the mixture from the heat and add the rice cereal and pecans.
4. Stir well to combine.
5. Shape the mixture into two 11-inch logs.
6. Roll each log in coconut.
7. Allow to cool, then slice thinly.
Yield: Two 11-inch logs.
